creator: brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
text:
I've upgraded the Gimp port to 1.0.0 - mostly just fixed the PLIST
	to represent the correct version number, added a master_site, and
	fixed some minor naming problems in the Makefile relative to this 
	new release.

How-To-Repeat: 
	apply diff below to update the gimp-devel port to 1.0.0
